use_cases: Primary CTA buttons on landing pages requiring premium visual differentiation
Action buttons in SaaS dashboards where visual polish enhances perceived quality
Interactive pricing plan buttons with engaging hover and click feedback
Feature discovery buttons in product tours with ripple animation feedback
Subscription or signup buttons where aesthetic appeal increases conversion likelihood
ai_summary: A premium WebGL shader-based button component featuring a liquid metal visual effect that responds to mouse movement. The button includes hover glow states, ripple click effects, and supports both text and icon display modes. Built with @paper-design/shaders for realistic metallic reflections and fluid animations, making it ideal for high-end SaaS products, creator platforms, and developer tools requiring distinctive interactive elements.
